Description: Datamailer MVP staging/production infrastructure skeleton: ARM Django web, Postgres, SQS/DLQs, Lambda workers, IAM, SES assumptions, alarms, and dashboard.

PublicSubnetId.Description: Public subnet for the low-cost ARM Django web instance.

PrivateSubnetIds.Description: Private subnets for Postgres and Lambda workers.

WebAmiId.Description: Ubuntu/Debian ARM64 AMI baked with Python, uv, Caddy, and the Datamailer systemd unit.

WebKeyName.Description: Optional EC2 key pair for emergency SSH. Prefer SSM Session Manager.

WebDomainName.Description: Environment host name served by Caddy/HTTPS, for example staging.datamailer.example.com.

OperatorAlarmTopicArn.Description: SNS topic ARN for alarm notifications.

LambdaArtifactBucket.Description: S3 bucket containing the Datamailer Lambda deployment zip.

LambdaArtifactKey.Description: S3 key for the Datamailer Lambda deployment zip.

LambdaLogRetentionDays.Description: CloudWatch Logs retention for Datamailer Lambda worker log groups.

SESSenderIdentity.Description: Verified SES domain or sender identity. HUMAN: verify DNS and production access before production traffic.

Properties.GroupDescription: Datamailer web ingress for HTTP/HTTPS and egress to Postgres/SQS/SES.
Datamailer Lambda worker egress to Postgres, SQS, SES, and Secrets Manager.
Datamailer Postgres ingress from web and Lambda workers only.

Properties.AlarmDescription: Transactional email queue latency is above two minutes.
Campaign email queue has stale messages.
SES webhook queue has stale messages.
Email events queue has stale messages.
One or more Datamailer Lambda workers are erroring.
Datamailer Lambda workers are being throttled.
Lambda p95 duration is close to the shortest worker timeout.
Postgres connection usage is high; evaluate lower Lambda concurrency or RDS Proxy.
Postgres free storage is below 5 GiB.
SES rejected or failed Datamailer sends.
SES bounce count is non-zero; check rate against account reputation and suppress affected contacts.
SES complaint count is non-zero; pause campaigns and suppress affected contacts.
Datamailer web health check failed. HUMAN: wire this to Route53 or CloudWatch Synthetics when the DNS name is live.
A campaign has remained in sending too long. Emit Datamailer/Campaigns SendingAgeSeconds from an ops cron or scheduled management command.
